Menu Heart Story Text: Every dish served, every glass shared with friends, and the unique sunset of Kaş tell an unforgettable story at Ehl-i Keyf. We invite you to share the freshest and most authentic moments of traditional Turkish tavern culture.
Every plate at Ehl-i Keyf tells a story of friendship. Combining fresh daily seafood with our hand-crafted mezze, we invite you to savor the harmony of traditional tavern heritage and modern Kaş breeze.

Our Story Title: Long Tables, Beautiful Conversations: The Ehl-i Keyf Story
Our Story Subtitle: A culinary journey in the heart of Kaş, blending traditional tavern culture with a bohemian Mediterranean soul.
The Roots Content: The story of Ehl-i Keyf is inspired by the unique, bohemian Mediterranean spirit of Kaş and the traditional tavern culture passed down through generations. Located in the heart of Kaş, where the ancient Lycian soul blends with the scent of the sea, we set out to honor friendship, conversation, and sharing. The warm tungsten lights glowing under our olive trees illuminate not just our tables, but every single memory made here. Ehl-i Keyf is not just a restaurant; it is a warm gathering place where long tables of friendship are set, and glasses are raised to love and conversation.
The Sea Content: The heart of tavern culture is undoubtedly the endless rakı tables. By setting our tables with the slogan 'Long tables, beautiful conversations,' we slow down the flow of time. At Ehl-i Keyf, every glass is raised to friendship, beautiful shared moments, and the sweet Mediterranean breeze. Accompanied by bohemian Mediterranean winds and carefully curated nostalgic background music, conversations deepen, and laughter multiplies. For us, the most precious thing is seeing our guests leave our tables with a warm smile on their faces.
The Flame Content: At the core of our culinary philosophy lie the freshest ingredients sourced from local producers and the generous seafood of the Mediterranean. We bring traditional Turkish mezzes to your tables, reinterpreted with modern touches by our master chefs. From our daily cold and warm mezzes to fresh seafood caught in season, every plate is designed to leave an unforgettable mark on your palate. The Ehl-i Keyf kitchen offers the most premium version of traditional tavern flavors.
The Gathering Title: The Address of Pleasure & Cozy Nights
The Gathering Content: Nostalgic tavern melodies are an indispensable part of Ehl-i Keyf's joyful and cozy evenings. In the heart of Kaş, under the olive branches, melodies rising alongside candlelight and a rich meze buffet feed the soul. Here, we don't just serve food; we keep the warmth and sincerity of the Mediterranean alive in every dish, every song, and every service. With our friendly and professional team, we build a bohemian and comfortable world where you feel right at home.
Conclusion Content: Ehl-i Keyf is a Mediterranean tavern that continuously evolves while staying true to its roots and never losing the sincerity and locality in its soul. As our slogan goes: 'The experts of pleasure is us. You just enjoy it.' We will continue to work with love in our kitchen, decorate your tables with joy, and add value to your Kaş evenings. We thank all our guests who join us in this unique journey of flavor and conversation. See you under our olive trees, around long tables.
